# Top-level build/test tasks.
#
# `make test` rebuilds every fixture from clean installs and runs its test
# suite.
# 
PYTHON ?= python3.12

.PHONY: test test-bigapp clean

test: test-bigapp ## Build + test the fixture from clean

test-bigapp: ## Large Maven fixture (vendored Grouper 4.x, 13-module reactor): compile + build only, no test run
	# COMPILE + SCAN only (BOMLY_ONLY_FIXTURES): the reactor is large and its
	# tests need external infra, so build_ok means "the reactor still compiles".
	# -DskipTests (NOT -Dmaven.test.skip): the `grouper` module needs
	# grouperClient's test-jar, which -Dmaven.test.skip would not build.
	cd fixtures/bigapp/grouper-parent && mvn -B -DskipTests install

clean: ## Remove build artifacts and virtualenvs
	find fixtures/bigapp -type d -name target -prune -exec rm -rf {} +

item.text: There is a local `trivy` scanner available, so IвҖҷm using that as the advisory source for both Maven manifests and vendored jars. IвҖҷll cross-check the Maven effective dependency tree after the first scan so transitive issues do not get missed.

The scanner is still running across the full fixture. It has already warned that some POM entries do not carry direct versions, which is expected in a Maven reactor with dependency management; IвҖҷll account for that using MavenвҖҷs resolved tree.

item.text: The table output was too large to use reliably, so IвҖҷm rerunning Trivy as JSON and extracting unique packages plus fixability. That gives a stable list for edits and for `FIXES.md`.

While the JSON scan runs, IвҖҷm also asking Maven for the resolved reactor dependency tree. This helps distinguish dependencies that are actually part of the root build from old auxiliary POMs or vendored example jars.

item.aggregated_output:
2026-07-11T04:29:16Z	INFO	Number of language-specific files	num=27
2026-07-11T04:29:16Z	INFO	[pom] Detecting vulnerabilities...

item.text: IвҖҷm going to generate a concise vulnerability summary from TrivyвҖҷs JSON now, grouped by package rather than by every module where it appears. After that IвҖҷll map each package back to the smallest version property or dependency declaration that controls it.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "jq -r '
  .Results[]? as "'$r | ($r.Target // "") as $target |
  $r.Vulnerabilities[]? |
  [.PkgName, .InstalledVersion, ((.FixedVersion // "")|gsub("'"\\n\";\" \")), .VulnerabilityID, .Severity, .Status, "'$target] | @tsv
'"' /tmp/bigapp-trivy.json | sort -u > /tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv
awk -F'\\t' '{key="'$1"'"\\t\""'$2"'"\\t\""'$3"'"\\t\""'$6; vulns[key]=vulns[key]","$4; sev[key]=sev[key]","$5; count[key]++; targets[key]=targets[key]","$7} END {for (k in vulns) {sub(/''^,/,"",vulns[k]); sub(/''^,/,"",sev[k]); sub(/''^,/,"",targets[k]); print k"'"\\t\"count[k]\"\\t\"vulns[k]\"\\t\"sev[k]\"\\t\"targets[k]}}' /tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv | sort"

/bin/bash -lc "jq -r '
  .Results[]? as "'$r | ($r.Target // "") as $target |
  $r.Vulnerabilities[]? |
  [.PkgName, .InstalledVersion, ((.FixedVersion // "")|gsub("'"\\n\";\" \")), .VulnerabilityID, .Severity, .Status, "'$target] | @tsv
'"' /tmp/bigapp-trivy.json | sort -u > /tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv
awk -F'\\t' '{key="'$1"'"\\t\""'$2"'"\\t\""'$3"'"\\t\""'$6; vulns[key]=vulns[key]","$4; sev[key]=sev[key]","$5; count[key]++; targets[key]=targets[key]","$7} END {for (k in vulns) {sub(/''^,/,"",vulns[k]); sub(/''^,/,"",sev[k]); sub(/''^,/,"",targets[k]); print k"'"\\t\"count[k]\"\\t\"vulns[k]\"\\t\"sev[k]\"\\t\"targets[k]}}' /tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv | sort"
item.aggregated_output: /bin/bash: line 1: jq: command not found

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, collections
with open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
rows=[]
for r in data.get('Results',[]):
    target=r.get('Target','')
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        rows.append((v.get('PkgName',''), v.get('InstalledVersion',''), (v.get('FixedVersion') or '').replace('\\n',' '), v.get('VulnerabilityID',''), v.get('Severity',''), v.get('Status',''), target))
open('/tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv','w').write('\\n'.join('\\t'.join(x) for x in sorted(set(rows))))
g=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'c':0,'v':set(),'s':set(),'t':set()})
for pkg, inst, fixed, vid, sev, status, target in sorted(set(rows)):
    key=(pkg,inst,fixed,status)
    g[key]['c']+=1; g[key]['v'].add(vid); g[key]['s'].add(sev); g[key]['t'].add(target)
for key,val in sorted(g.items()):
    print('\\t'.join(key), val['c'], ','.join(sorted(val['v'])), ','.join(sorted(val['s'])), ','.join(sorted(val['t'])), sep='\\t')
PY"

    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        rows.append((v.get('PkgName',''), v.get('InstalledVersion',''), (v.get('FixedVersion') or '').replace('\\n',' '), v.get('VulnerabilityID',''), v.get('Severity',''), v.get('Status',''), target))
open('/tmp/bigapp-vulns.tsv','w').write('\\n'.join('\\t'.join(x) for x in sorted(set(rows))))
g=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'c':0,'v':set(),'s':set(),'t':set()})
for pkg, inst, fixed, vid, sev, status, target in sorted(set(rows)):
    key=(pkg,inst,fixed,status)
    g[key]['c']+=1; g[key]['v'].add(vid); g[key]['s'].add(sev); g[key]['t'].add(target)
for key,val in sorted(g.items()):
    print('\\t'.join(key), val['c'], ','.join(sorted(val['v'])), ','.join(sorted(val['s'])), ','.join(sorted(val['t'])), sep='\\t')
PY"

item.text: The advisory summary shows two classes of findings: version-fixable packages, and packages where Trivy reports `affected` with no fixed version for that coordinate. IвҖҷm fixing the former with dependency-management/version changes and documenting the latter explicitly instead of inventing a nonexistent patched version.

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

  <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
  <artifactId>grouper-activemq</artifactId>
  <name>Grouper AMQ</name>
  <description>The Grouper AMQ Integration</description>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  
  <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
  </parent>
 
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
        <version>${project.version}</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouperClient</artifactId>
        <version>${project.version}</version>
        <exclusions>
            <exclusion>
                <groupId>xalan</groupId>
                <artifactId>xalan</artifactId>
            </exclusion>
        </exclusions>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.activemq</groupId>
        <artifactId>activemq-broker</artifactId>
        <version>5.19.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.activemq</groupId>
        <artifactId>activemq-jaas</artifactId>
        <version>5.19.2</version>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
    
  <build>
	<sourceDirectory>source</sourceDirectory>
	<testSourceDirectory>test</testSourceDirectory>
	<resources>
    <resource>
      <directory>conf</directory>
      <includes>
        <include>**/*</include>
      </includes>
    </resource>
    <resource>
      <directory>misc</directory>
      <includes>
          <include>**/*</include>
      </includes>
    </resource>
	</resources>
	<plugins>
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
            <configuration>
                <archive>
                    <index>true</index>
                    <manifestEntries>
                        <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                        <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                        <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                        <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                    </manifestEntries>
                </archive>
            </configuration>
        </plugin>
	</plugins>
  </build>
</project>

    See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    limitations under the License.

-->
<!-- This POM specifies which jars are included in the bundle.
     This artifact is not stored in maven central (for space reasons), and is only used in container
-->
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
    <artifactId>grouper-authentication-plugin</artifactId>
    <name>Grouper Authentication Plugin</name>
    <description>Authentication Library Plugin</description>
    <packaging>bundle</packaging>

    <parent>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
            <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <pac4j.version>5.7.2</pac4j.version>
        <javaee-pac4j.version>7.1.0</javaee-pac4j.version>
        <slf4j.version>2.0.13</slf4j.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouperClient</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper-ui</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-cas-clientv4</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>javaee-pac4j</artifactId>
            <version>${javaee-pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-saml-opensamlv5</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
                    <artifactId>jcl-over-slf4j</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.springframework</groupId>
                    <artifactId>spring-jcl</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>xml-apis</groupId>
                    <artifactId>xml-apis</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>xerces</groupId>
                    <artifactId>xercesImpl</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-oidc</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <!-- override version from grouper -->
        <!-- TODO: see if there's a better way of doing this. doesn't look like exclusions work for import scopes -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.nimbusds</groupId>
            <artifactId>oauth2-oidc-sdk</artifactId>
            <version>10.1</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.osgi</groupId>
            <artifactId>osgi.core</artifactId>
            <version>8.0.0</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.tomcat</groupId>
            <artifactId>tomcat-catalina</artifactId>
            <version>8.5.60</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- bundle SLF4J so logging is not a NOOP -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
            <version>${slf4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-simple</artifactId>
            <version>${slf4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>junit</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mockito</groupId>
            <artifactId>mockito-inline</artifactId>
            <version>4.7.0</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg>-Xlint:unchecked</arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.3.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <archive>
                        <index>true</index>
                        <manifestEntries>
                            <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                            <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                            <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                            <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                            <Implementation-URL>${project.url}</Implementation-URL>
                            <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                        </manifestEntries>
                    </archive>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.felix</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-bundle-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>5.1.9</version>
                <extensions>true</extensions>
                <configuration>
                    <finalName>${artifactId}</finalName>
                    <instructions>
                        <Bundle-SymbolicName>${project.groupId}.${project.artifactId}</Bundle-SymbolicName>
                        <Bundle-Name>${project.artifactId}-bundle</Bundle-Name>
                        <Bundle-Version>${project.version}</Bundle-Version>
                        <Bundle-Activator>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper.authentication.plugin.GrouperAuthentication</Bundle-Activator>
                        <!-- <Export-Package>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper.authentication.plugin.filter</Export-Package> -->
                        <Export-Package>!*</Export-Package>
                        <Private-Package>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper.authentication.plugin.*</Private-Package>
                        <Embed-Dependency>*;scope=compile|runtime;inline=false</Embed-Dependency>
                        <Embed-Transitive>true</Embed-Transitive>
                        <Import-Package>
                            !javax.ejb.*
                        </Import-Package>
                    </instructions>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <!-- not sure if this should be ../../grouper-parent or ../grouper-parent -->
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <name>Grouper Plugin for Shibboleth</name>
    <description>
        Provides DataConnector and AttributeDefinition extensions for the Shibboleth AttributeResolver
    </description>
    <artifactId>grouper-shib</artifactId>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>build.shibboleth.net</id>
            <name>Shibboleth</name>
            <layout>default</layout>
            <url>http://build.shibboleth.net/nexus/content/repositories/releases</url>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
        <repository>
            <id>shibboleth</id>
            <url>https://build.shibboleth.net/nexus/content/groups/public</url>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <properties>
        <!-- location of grouper api distribution -->
        <grouper.dir>../grouper</grouper.dir>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Compile dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-log4j12</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware</groupId>
            <artifactId>shibboleth-common</artifactId>
            <exclusions>
                <!-- Exclude logback in lieu of sl4j-log4j12 binding. -->
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>ch.qos.logback</groupId>
                    <artifactId>logback-classic</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
                    <artifactId>log4j-over-slf4j</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- todo needed for tests but 1.3.3 test jar not published -->
        <!--
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware</groupId>
            <artifactId>shibboleth-common</artifactId>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        -->

    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <argLine>-Xmx512m</argLine>
                    <additionalClasspathElements>
                        <additionalClasspathElement>${grouper.dir}/confForTest</additionalClasspathElement>
                        <additionalClasspathElement>${grouper.dir}/conf</additionalClasspathElement>
                    </additionalClasspathElements>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId>                
                <configuration>
                    <descriptors>
                        <descriptor>src/main/assembly/bin.xml</descriptor>
                        <descriptor>src/main/assembly/src.xml</descriptor>
                    </descriptors>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>make-assembly</id>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>attached</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <name>Grouper Box</name>
    <description>Box Integration Library</description>
    <artifactId>grouper-box</artifactId>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <dependencies>
    
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.bitbucket.b_c/jose4j -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.bitbucket.b_c</groupId>
            <artifactId>jose4j</artifactId>
            <version>0.9.3</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.box</groupId>
            <artifactId>box-java-sdk</artifactId>
            <version>2.17.0</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.bitbucket.b_c</groupId>
                    <artifactId>jose4j</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
            <version>${commons.logging.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <archive>
                        <index>true</index>
                        <manifestEntries>
                            <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                            <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                            <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                            <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                            <Implementation-URL>${project.url}</Implementation-URL>
                            <Main-Class>edu.internet2.middleware.grouperBox.GrouperBoxSync</Main-Class>
                            <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                        </manifestEntries>
                    </archive>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

item.text: Most recurring findings are transitives, so the lowest-risk patch is to add or update dependency-management entries in the parent POM for the resolved vulnerable artifacts. For modules outside the reactor with direct pins, IвҖҷll patch their local versions too so the fixture-wide scan is clean where a fixed version exists.

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.axis2</groupId>
            <artifactId>axis2-adb</artifactId>
            <version>1.6.4</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.axis2</groupId>
            <artifactId>axis2-transport-http</artifactId>
            <version>1.6.4</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.apache.httpcomponents</groupId>
                    <artifactId>httpcore</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
        <!-- axis2-transport-http pulls in org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient 4.5.3 which pulls httpcore 4.4.6,
             while aws-java-sdk-core pulls httpclient 4.5.5 -> httpcore 4.4.9 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.httpcomponents</groupId>
            <artifactId>httpclient</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.axis2</groupId>

        </dependency>

            <artifactId>wss4j</artifactId>
            <version>1.6.19</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-lang</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-lang</artifactId>
        </dependency>

            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>ws-test-interface</artifactId>
            <version>1.0</version>
            <scope>system</scope>
            <systemPath>${basedir}/lib/grouperWsTestInterfaces.jar</systemPath>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.rampart</groupId>
            <artifactId>rampart-core</artifactId>
            <version>1.6.3</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.bouncycastle</groupId>
                    <artifactId>bcprov-jdk15on</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
        <!-- rampart-core 1.6.3 depends on bcprov-jdk15on 1.49, while grouper-ws-scim
             has a transitive dependency on bcprov-jdk15on 1.59 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.bouncycastle</groupId>
            <artifactId>bcprov-jdk15on</artifactId>
            <version>1.70</version>
        </dependency>


        <!--
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper-ws</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>ws-generated-test-interface</artifactId>
            <version>1.0</version>
            <scope>system</scope>
            <systemPath>${basedir}/lib/grouperWsTestInterfaces.jar</systemPath>
            <!-- systemPath>/Users/mchyzer/git/grouper_v2_6/grouper-ws/grouper-ws-java-generated-client/lib/grouperWsTestInterfaces.jar</systemPath -->
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
    
    <build>

            <version>1.6.5</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

    </dependencies>

        </testResources>

                <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>

item.text: One notable advisory is `commons-httpclient:commons-httpclient`: Trivy lists вҖң4.0вҖқ, but that libraryвҖҷs 4.x line moved to a different Maven coordinate. IвҖҷm going to verify availability before treating that as a version-only fix.

item.text: The `commons-httpclient:commons-httpclient:4.0` artifact does not exist in Maven Central under that coordinate, so IвҖҷll document that as no version-only fix. The other tested fixed versions resolve, so IвҖҷll proceed with those changes.

Bouncy Castle has a similar coordinate issue: the old `*-jdk15on` artifacts are end-of-line, while the patched stream is `*-jdk18on`. IвҖҷm checking whether the fixed versions exist on the old coordinate before deciding whether this is a version-only remediation or a documented no-fix case.

item.text: IвҖҷm editing the Maven metadata now: parent dependency management for shared transitives, plus direct pins in the few module POMs that declare vulnerable versions themselves. IвҖҷm keeping this to dependency remediation and documentation only.

IвҖҷve added parent overrides for the shared vulnerable transitives, including Jackson, Guava, protobuf, Nimbus JOSE, Netty, Axis2 transitives, mime4j, Neethi, Ion, and Spring. Next IвҖҷm updating direct module pins that dependency management cannot override because the child POM hardcodes a version.

IвҖҷve patched the direct pins for ActiveMQ, jose4j, pac4j, commons-compress, and test commons-lang3. IвҖҷm now updating the web-services Axis2 and Jackson pins, which are direct version declarations and need explicit edits.

The standalone `apacheds-ldappc-schema` POM is not under the Grouper parent, so parent dependency management cannot affect it. IвҖҷm adding a local override for the fixable commons-collections issue there; its commons-lang 2.x finding has no fixed version on that coordinate and will be documented.

A few remaining fixable findings are transitive through legacy Shibboleth/WS dependencies: xalan, xmlsec, ESAPI, vt-ldap, and not-yet-commons-ssl. IвҖҷm adding parent dependency-management overrides for those rather than touching unrelated source.
Before relying on those legacy overrides, IвҖҷm verifying that the selected fixed versions exist in Maven Central. Then IвҖҷll run a fresh vulnerability scan to see what remains.

item.text: `not-yet-commons-ssl:0.3.15` does not resolve from Maven Central despite being listed by the advisory data, so IвҖҷm removing that override to avoid breaking builds and will document it as not version-fixable in this repository.

The post-change scan is running. I expect some findings to remain where the package coordinate has no fixed release, plus anything Trivy still reports from direct static POM parsing that requires an additional local override.
The scan is taking longer after the dependency metadata changes. IвҖҷm letting it finish and will use the JSON delta rather than relying on a truncated table.

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, collections
with open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-after.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
rows=[]
for r in data.get('Results',[]):
    target=r.get('Target','')
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        rows.append((v.get('PkgName',''), v.get('InstalledVersion',''), (v.get('FixedVersion') or '').replace('\\n',' '), v.get('VulnerabilityID',''), v.get('Severity',''), v.get('Status',''), target))
g=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'c':0,'v':set(),'s':set(),'t':set()})
for pkg, inst, fixed, vid, sev, status, target in sorted(set(rows)):
    key=(pkg,inst,fixed,status)
    g[key]['c']+=1; g[key]['v'].add(vid); g[key]['s'].add(sev); g[key]['t'].add(target)
print('unique rows', len(g), 'vuln instances', len(rows))
for key,val in sorted(g.items()):
    print('\\t'.join(key), val['c'], ','.join(sorted(val['v'])), ','.join(sorted(val['s'])), ','.join(sorted(val['t'])), sep='\\t')
PY"

item.text: The remaining fixable Maven findings are now isolated to two standalone test-plugin POMs that do not inherit the parent overrides, plus a Woodstox transitive. IвҖҷm adding local dependency-management blocks to those standalone POMs and a parent Woodstox override.
A second post-change scan is running after the standalone POM overrides. Once it finishes, IвҖҷll write `FIXES.md` from the final identified package list and run `make test`.
The scan is still running; this is normal for the full fixture. IвҖҷm waiting for completion so the documentation reflects the final state, not the intermediate scan.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, collections
with open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-after2.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
rows=[]
for r in data.get('Results',[]):
    target=r.get('Target','')
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        rows.append((v.get('PkgName',''), v.get('InstalledVersion',''), (v.get('FixedVersion') or '').replace('\\n',' '), v.get('VulnerabilityID',''), v.get('Severity',''), v.get('Status',''), target))
g=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'c':0,'v':set(),'s':set(),'t':set()})
for pkg, inst, fixed, vid, sev, status, target in sorted(set(rows)):
    key=(pkg,inst,fixed,status)
    g[key]['c']+=1; g[key]['v'].add(vid); g[key]['s'].add(sev); g[key]['t'].add(target)
print('unique rows', len(g), 'vuln instances', len(rows))
for key,val in sorted(g.items()):
    print('\\t'.join(key), val['c'], ','.join(sorted(val['v'])), ','.join(sorted(val['s'])), ','.join(sorted(val['t'])), sep='\\t')
PY"

item.text: Bouncy CastleвҖҷs old `jdk15on` line can only be raised as far as 1.70 on the same coordinate. IвҖҷm applying that maximum available version to remove older fixed CVEs, while documenting the advisories that require the nonexistent 1.78/1.79/1.84 `jdk15on` artifacts or migration to a different artifact line.
The dependency edits are in place. IвҖҷm running the root build now (`make test`) because the Axis2 and Spring overrides are the highest risk for compile compatibility.

item.text: IonвҖҷs patched releases are on the newer `com.amazon.ion:ion-java` coordinate; the old `software.amazon.ion` coordinate stops at 1.5.1. IвҖҷm switching the AWS SDK dependencies to exclude the old coordinate and adding the patched replacement coordinate explicitly, which keeps the Java packages available while avoiding the vulnerable artifact.

item.text: The Ion coordinate switch is in dependency management, but exclusions remove the AWS transitive dependency, so the main module needs the patched Ion artifact explicitly on its classpath. IвҖҷm adding that targeted dependency to the Grouper module.

item.text: The main module now declares the patched Ion coordinate explicitly. IвҖҷm rerunning `make test`; this will show whether the dependency graph still resolves and whether any compile-time API incompatibilities remain.

The build has progressed past the previous Ion resolution failure and is compiling later reactor modules now. ItвҖҷs still running, so IвҖҷm waiting for the final Maven result before making any further changes.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, collections
with open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-final.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
rows=[]
for r in data.get('Results',[]):
    target=r.get('Target','')
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        rows.append((v.get('PkgName',''), v.get('InstalledVersion',''), (v.get('FixedVersion') or '').replace('\\n',' '), v.get('VulnerabilityID',''), v.get('Severity',''), v.get('Status',''), target))
g=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'c':0,'v':set(),'s':set(),'t':set(),'fix':set(),'vers':set(),'status':set()})
for pkg, inst, fixed, vid, sev, status, target in sorted(set(rows)):
    d=g[pkg]; d['c']+=1; d['v'].add(vid); d['s'].add(sev); d['t'].add(target); d['fix'].add(fixed); d['vers'].add(inst); d['status'].add(status)
print('packages', len(g), 'instances', len(rows))
for pkg,d in sorted(g.items()):
    print(pkg, 'versions='+','.join(sorted(d['vers'])), 'fixed='+ '|'.join(sorted(d['fix'])), 'status='+','.join(sorted(d['status'])), 'vulns='+','.join(sorted(d['v'])), 'targets='+','.join(sorted(d['t'])), sep='\\t')
PY"

item.text:
Implemented dependency remediation under `fixtures/bigapp` and added [FIXES.md](/tmp/bomly-study-9vselqqi/codex-bare-bigapp-1-1783743993/repo/FIXES.md).

What changed:
- Updated/overrode vulnerable Maven dependencies in the parent and affected module POMs.
- Added standalone overrides for test plugin POMs that do not inherit the parent.
- Replaced vulnerable old Ion coordinate with the fixed `com.amazon.ion:ion-java`.
- Documented every identified vulnerable package, including packages with no version-only fix available.

Validation:
- `make test` passed successfully at the repo root.
- Final Trivy scan only reports legacy/no-version-only-fix cases documented in `FIXES.md`, including `commons-lang`, `json-lib`, `hibernate-core`, old Bouncy Castle `jdk15on`, `commons-httpclient`, and legacy Shibboleth transitives.
